task.role: You are a Senior Frontend Engineer with expertise in React, TypeScript, and modern UI/UX. Implement Task 8 with production-quality code.

context.overview: Build Next.js 15 web console with dashboard, notification history, and real-time WebSocket feed
context.background: This task is part of a larger project. Key resources: - PRD: .tasks/docs/prd.txt (full requirements and architecture) - Related tasks: 2, 3 - Infrastructure config: Check ConfigMaps for connection strings

requirements.description: Next.js 15 App Router with React 19, shadcn/ui, TailwindCSS 4, Effect for validation and data fetching, TanStack Query, WebSocket Stream.

constraints.constraint: Match existing codebase patterns and conventions
Create PR with atomic, well-described commits
Include unit tests for new functionality
PR title format: feat(task-8): Web Console Dashboard (Blaze - React/Next.js)

acceptance_criteria.criterion: All requirements from task description implemented
Code follows project conventions and style guide
Unit tests, E2E with Playwright, visual regression tests

deliverables.deliverable: Unit tests covering new code paths
